task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the specification document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or file viewer is open displaying the contents of a specification file (e.g., executive_briefing_spec.txt) from /home/ga/Documents/.

task_completion.description: Agent opens the original performance presentation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A presentation software (like LibreOffice Impress or WPS Presentation) is open showing 'performance.pptx', which originally contains 48 slides.

task_completion.description: The first slide has the required exact title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The first slide of the new presentation clearly displays the title 'Apache Infrastructure: Q4 2024 Executive Briefing'.

task_completion.description: The last slide contains the required keyword.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final slide of the new presentation contains the text 'Q&A' or 'Questions'.

task_completion.description: The presentation is condensed to the maximum allowed slides.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The slide pane or thumbnail view in the presentation software shows that the total number of slides in the new presentation is 12 or fewer.

task_completion.description: The new presentation is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The presentation software's title bar shows 'executive_briefing.pptx' or a file manager window shows 'executive_briefing.pptx' located in /home/ga/Documents/.

integrity.description: Agent used a GUI presentation software to edit the slides.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a graphical presentation application (e.g., LibreOffice Impress, WPS Presentation) rather than terminal commands or Python scripts generating the file.

integrity.description: The original performance.pptx was not overwritten.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses 'Save As' to create the new file, or the original 'performance.pptx' is still visible in the file manager alongside the new 'executive_briefing.pptx'.

integrity.description: The new presentation contains actual condensed content, not just empty slides.
integrity.visual_evidence: The slides in the new presentation contain charts, text, or data derived from the original presentation, rather than being completely blank except for the required titles.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The specification file is located at '/home/ga/Documents/executive_briefing_spec.txt'. The last slide must include the keyword 'Q&A' or 'Questions'.
